let x = 64;  -- introduce a variable
x = 100;      -- reassign a variable already introduced with let
print x;     -- output the result

let x = 1000;
print x;  ;  // print the result

let x = 64 + 64 + 64 + 64;  -- sum of 4 twos

x;  -- print the result

let x = 42;  -- introduce variable x
print x;     -- print 42

print x;

print x;

let z = 0xff
let a = !x
let b = !y
let c = a + b

print c

print a;           ;  // print value of a

print b;           ;  // print value of b
repeat w { print x; } ;  // loop with count w, print x

x = 1_000;   -- reassign x
print x;     -- print result
if x { 2; } else if x { 3; } else { 4; }  -- else-if chains are flat

if x >= 64 { print(64); } else if x >= 128 { print(128); } else { print(0); }

  print "x is greater than 100"

  print "x is exactly 100"
else

}

}

  print x;    ;  // Output x after each subtraction
}

if x == 0 {   ;  // Check if x is zero
  x = false;  ;  // Set x to false
  print x;    ;  // Print false
}

  x = 1_000;              -- assign to the variable
  print x;               -- output the value
}

  x = !x;                   -- apply a function
  print x;                -- output the value
}

print(c);  -- output the result

print x

if x == false { print x } else if x == true { print x } else { print x }

let x = 10
x = 20

if x != 0 then
  print x
else
  print "error: divide by zero"
endif

repeat x { print x }

let x = 0;  -- introduce a variable
x = 10;     -- reassign a variable already introduced with let
x = 20;     -- reassign a variable already introduced with let
x = x / 5;  -- compute
if (x != 0) {  -- guard against divide-by-zero
    x = x + 10;  -- compute overflow
    print x;   -- output
}
else {  -- guard against overflow
    x = 5;     -- compute overflow
    print x;   -- output
}

print x

repeat x { print x; }

repeat x { print x }

repeat 3 { print x; x = 1_000; }

let x = 42;                    ;  -- introduce variable
let y = 1_000;                  ;  -- introduce variable
print y;                        ;  -- print 1000
repeat if x < y { print x; } else if x > y { print y; } else { print y; }  ;  -- loop

let y = 64
print y
repeat x { print x }

let x = 42;   ;  // introduce variable x
print x;     ;  // print value of x
repeat x { x++; }  ;  // repeat loop with up-front count 1

let y = 1_000;   ;  -- introduce variable y
let z = 0xff;   ;  -- introduce variable z

let b = false;  ;  -- introduce variable b

repeat if (a && b) { print x; print y; print z; }
